channel.title: Carnival on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Carnival on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Yard Report — Thursday, April 16, 2026
item.description: Six months after Melissa, Westmoreland still dark. UHWI owes $40 billion in taxes. Carnival was nice though.

item.title: Auntie Cheryl From Chaguanas — Thursday, April 16, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl is fully supportive of Kamla's comments about CARICOM and has been saying this for years, if anyone had been listening.

item.title: Trini Dispatch — Thursday, April 16, 2026
item.description: Kamla calls CARICOM dysfunctional. The US still doesn't want to visit. A $3.4 billion housing deal needs explaining.

item.title: Cousin Leroy Report — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: Cousin Leroy is watching Road March from the Bronx on his phone, upset about the Negril ambulance situation, and has opinions about the oil price and the budget.

item.title: Caribbean Brief: Barbados Votes TODAY, Cuba on 4-Day Work Week, Jamaica Shaken
item.description: Barbados goes to the polls as Mottley seeks historic third term, Cuba adopts emergency 4-day work week over fuel crisis, Jamaica rattled by 5.0 earthquake, and Trinidad Carnival is days away.

item.title: 🌴 Caribbean Brief: Barbados Election Countdown, Trinidad's Police Scandal, and Carnival Season Heats Up
item.description: Barbados heads to polls February 11 with Mottley seeking a historic third term, Trinidad reels from CCTV footage of a police shooting, Carnival season kicks into high gear, and West Indies prep for T20 World Cup. Your regional Caribbean news roundup.
